notes: Two structural variants exist: the base version places h2 and event-details directly inside .teaser-text; the v2 variant (event-teaser--v2) wraps the title in .teaser-text__title and the details in .teaser-text__info. When href is provided and v2 is true, the h2 title is wrapped in an anchor tag. The .event-details.ev-venue inner structure varies — sometimes it contains a .ev-date or .ev-venue nested div, sometimes the span is direct. The venueText prop maps to the inner span text.
